{{Quote|Bah! Homebrewed swill, more likely! Where would a beggar like you obtain gizer, the prince of ales?|[[Kyood Vurd|Vurd's henchman]]|<ref name="SW17">[[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]]</ref>}}
'''Gizer ale''' was a popular [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drink known for its blue color and musky scent, developed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gizer/Legends|Gizer]]. It also came in a [[Gizer Pale Blue ale|lighter variety]].

[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] was known to enjoy Gizer ale.<ref name="cd">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref>

Prior to their involvement in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] raced in a bet against the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Reck Desh]] for fifty cases of Gizer ale, which they won.
